68436044.title: Olivia Dean
68436044.extract:
Olivia Lauryn Dean (born 14 March 1999) is an English singer and songwriter. Her accolades include a Grammy Award and nominations for eight Brit Awards and the Mercury Prize.
After signing to EMI in 2019, Dean released her debut album Messy (2023), which received critical acclaim and a nomination for the Mercury Prize. She achieved global recognition with her second album The Art of Loving (2025), which topped the UK Albums chart and yielded the UK number one single "Man I Need". Together with the singles "Nice to Each Other", "So Easy (To Fall in Love)", and "Rein Me In", Dean became the first female solo artist to simultaneously have four UK top-ten singles. In 2026, she won the Grammy Award for Best New Artist.
